originalBehavior: The published article opens with a threshold-driven classifier scene that updates a confusion-matrix style grid as the reader changes the cutoff for binary predictions.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original threshold slider, draggable threshold marker, and linked confusion-state rendering from the compiled app.
notes: The route still mounts from the original compiled bundle into an otherwise empty document body.
Only metadata and public-shell branding were patched around the app.
evidence: The implementation plan treats the confusion-matrix sandbox and threshold tradeoff scene as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage will move a threshold control and verify the confusion-state output changes.

originalBehavior: Precision, recall, and F1 explanations stay synchronized with the currently active threshold and visible numerator or denominator breakdowns.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original metric readouts, formula text, and F1 chart updates without rewriting the compiled logic.
notes: KaTeX rendering continues through the vendored MLU math stack.
The metric values still update from the same internal stores as the threshold scenes.
evidence: The plan explicitly calls out precision and recall readouts plus formula synchronization as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage will verify that metric values and labels update together after threshold changes.

originalBehavior: The article advances through accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and tradeoff sections with scroll-linked instructional state changes and chart transitions.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original section order, compiled scroll behavior, and scene-specific chart or legend updates from the published bundle.
notes: The original section IDs and chart containers were preserved so the published scene progression still drives the page.
No new explanatory steps or local-only controls were added.
evidence: The implementation plan treats scroll-linked instructional state changes as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage will verify the main scene initializes cleanly and the threshold-driven metric state remains synchronized.

originalBehavior: The published route included MLU branding, creator bylines, analytics, repo and promo links, and contributor callouts inside the public body.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell references, localizes the remaining navigation, and uses the shared footer as the single live original-page reference surface.
notes: Docs retain the upstream repo and provenance notes.
The public page no longer exposes creator or project promo surfaces outside the footer.
evidence: The public-surface audit blocks creator names, MLU branding, upstream domains, promo links, and contributor callouts in shipped route code.
The route now advertises only the shared footer link back to the live original page.
